examples: Opening inventory cadence tightened: the three rowboats now read in one sentence instead of a choppy list, which better matches the style target's controlled tactical flow.
The storage-room/crypt inventory was consolidated so the prose sounds like one mind reading terrain under pressure, not a series of note cards.
Sanctum tableau duplication was trimmed: the repeated specimen-jar and Jaina-position beats were collapsed into one sharper room-read.
Kel'Thuzad's compliment aftermath lost the explanatory captions ('No sneer. No bait.') and now lands through Sylvanas's immediate reaction.
Aftermath desk read was merged into one sentence, removing the duplicate cold-cup image and preserving the style target's preference for single strong anchors.
Late-scene transition language was tightened ('The south road cut through contaminated dark') to keep the closing register lean and thriller-clean.
Jaina's visible pause at the sanctum now stays external; the line no longer claims Sylvanas knows exactly what Jaina is waiting for.
The room-read preserves Sylvanas's inference while avoiding omniscient certainty about Jaina's motives or internal allegiance.
Kel'Thuzad's effect on the room is kept in Sylvanas's perception — voice, posture, clean delivery — instead of neutral narrator commentary.
The revised desk passage removes the broken referent around Kel'Thuzad's corpse and keeps the camera on what Sylvanas sees.
Jaina's end-of-chapter briefing was cut back from report language toward the immediate road-use version Sylvanas would actually pull first.
Caer Darrow remains callback territory: island keep, lake crossing, and missing-Jaina evidence are treated as confirmation, not fresh revelation.
Cyndia's right-side checks were preserved at the shore and window because the Cyndia/Lyriel continuity scar is already established.
The sanctum keeps the inherited chapter12 room-state intact: chalk, cold cup, boards, Kel'Thuzad calm, and Jaina's position all remain visible.
Kel'Thuzad's final data point still lands as the northeast corridor, preserving the plan's death beat and his scholar-to-the-end continuity.
The re-formed closing line keeps the three-woman road geometry: Cyndia left, Jaina center, Sylvanas forward-right by half a step.
Opening short-sentence chains around the shoreline and rowboats were broken with one longer inventory sentence.
The 'school still at work' corridor beat now varies sentence length instead of stacking fragment after fragment.
The workroom horror inventory was reshaped into one longer descriptive sentence followed by a short hit.
Sanctum scan cadence was varied so the threshold read does not flatten into five equal declaratives.
Combat commentary between barrier placement and Sylvanas's shot was condensed into a single loaded sentence to avoid metronomic beats.
The post-kill desk read and Jaina mechanism line were tightened to avoid another fragment cluster.
The exit route passage now uses one summary sentence instead of three clipped labels in a row.
Shoreline -> breach still follows the plan's causal chain: boat read, ward pressure, east-wall climb, then service-route entry.
Jandice's poisoned first read remains intact, but the chapter no longer over-explains Sylvanas's interpretation of it in the sanctum.
Sanctum -> exit keeps the partnership crack in spacing and checking behavior rather than spending it on argument.
The chapter close now protects chapter14's handoff by reducing the mechanism explanation to the immediate road-usable point.
Cross-chapter coherence holds: chapter12 ended with Sylvanas felt through the wards, and chapter13 rewinds cleanly to her shoreline approach before colliding with that room-state.
continuity.crossChapter: Intentional rewind preserved. The opening anchors the reader at Darrowmere and the closing hands directly into chapter14's southbound briefing.

examples: Removed narrator over-explanation around Kel'Thuzad's sincerity; the prose now trusts the genuine compliment to do the damage.
Cut leftover statement-restatement around the sanctum scan, especially the repeated Jaina-position and specimen-jar material.
Fixed the broken corpse referent ('He looked at it without surprise') with a clean death-state observation.
Trimmed the 'Good' / 'Enough' overuse in load-bearing aftermath beats while leaving the strongest emphatic fragments in place.
Reduced scenic agency in lines that made road or room abstractions do the work instead of concrete physical detail.
Flattened one surviving document-voice patch by changing 'I have the full mechanism' to speech a tired field mage would actually use.
Jaina's road line changed from 'I have the full mechanism' to 'I know how it wakes,' removing report-speak.
Her first sanctum summary was simplified from document cadence to plainer spoken pressure: 'It carries it. The body does the rest... Death finishes it.'
The chapter now holds Kel'Thuzad in occult-academic diction rather than modern technical jargon; his lines stayed intact because they already matched the voice sheet.
Sylvanas's dialogue remained clipped and field-useful, with no drift into planner language or overt emotional naming.
Cyndia's relay speech stayed operational and plain, which suits both her voice and the chapter's urgency.
